languages.text: "Я провел юность в роскоши. Пусть фон Валанциусы и не были самым влиятельным домом в Просторе Коронус, но мы были богаты. У меня было все, кроме того, чего я действительно хотел... Я видел сны о далеких звездах и воображал, как я, Себериан фон Валанциус, исследую неизвестные миры, расширяя границы протектората..." {n}Выцветшие ресницы Себериана трепещут, а кожа натягивается, словно он пытается улыбнуться.{/n} "Однако мечты оставались лишь мечтами, ведь я был лишь пятым в очереди на наследование Патента".

traits.locale_text: "Я провел юность в роскоши. Пусть фон Валанциусы и не были самым влиятельным домом в Просторе Коронус, но мы были богаты. У меня было все, кроме того, чего я действительно хотел... Я видел сны о далеких звездах и воображал, как я, Себериан фон Валанциус, исследую неизвестные миры, расширяя границы протектората..." {n}Выцветшие ресницы Себериана трепещут, а кожа натягивается, словно он пытается улыбнуться.{/n} "Однако мечты оставались лишь мечтами, ведь я был лишь пятым в очереди на наследование Патента".

languages.text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

У меня было все, кроме того, чего я действительно хотел... Я видел сны о далеких звездах и воображал, как я, Себериан фон Валанциус, исследую неизвестные миры, расширяя границы протектората..." {n}Выцветшие ресницы Себериана трепещут, а кожа натягивается, словно он пытается улыбнуться.{/n} "Однако мечты оставались лишь мечтами, ведь я был лишь пятым в очереди на наследование Патента".

"I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

languages.text: "Ich habe meine Jungend in Luxus verbracht. Von Valancius war vielleicht nicht das einflussreichste Haus in der Koronus-Ausdehnung, aber wir wahren wohlhabend. Ich hatte alles. Nur nicht, was ich am meisten begehrte. Ich träumte von fernen Sternen und stellte mir vor, wie ich, Seberian von Valancius, unbekannte Welten erkunde und die Grenzen des Protektorats ausdehne ..." {n}Seberian verblasste Wimpern flattern und seine Haut strafft sich, als wolle er lächeln.{/n} "Aber meine Träume blieben bloße Träume, denn ich stand in der Erbfolge um den Handelsbrief nur auf Rang fünf."
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

Nur nicht, was ich am meisten begehrte. Ich träumte von fernen Sternen und stellte mir vor, wie ich, Seberian von Valancius, unbekannte Welten erkunde und die Grenzen des Protektorats ausdehne ..." {n}Seberian verblasste Wimpern flattern und seine Haut strafft sich, als wolle er lächeln.{/n} "Aber meine Träume blieben bloße Träume, denn ich stand in der Erbfolge um den Handelsbrief nur auf Rang fünf."

languages.text: « J'ai passé ma jeunesse dans le luxe. La maison von Valancius n'était peut-être pas la plus influente des Étendues de Koronus, mais nous avions de l'argent. J'avais tout, sauf ce que je désirais vraiment. Je rêvais d'étoiles lointaines et je m'imaginais, moi, Seberian von Valancius, explorant des mondes inconnus et repoussant les frontières du protectorat... » {n}Les cils presque effacés de Seberian battent légèrement, et sa peau se tend comme pour esquisser un sourire.{/n} « Cela étant, tout ceci restait dans ma tête, n'étant qu'en cinquième position dans la ligne de succession de la lettre de marque. »
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai passé ma jeunesse dans le luxe. La maison von Valancius n'était peut-être pas la plus influente des Étendues de Koronus, mais nous avions de l'argent. J'avais tout, sauf ce que je désirais vraiment. Je rêvais d'étoiles lointaines et je m'imaginais, moi, Seberian von Valancius, explorant des mondes inconnus et repoussant les frontières du protectorat... » {n}Les cils presque effacés de Seberian battent légèrement, et sa peau se tend comme pour esquisser un sourire.{/n} « Cela étant, tout ceci restait dans ma tête, n'étant qu'en cinquième position dans la ligne de succession de la lettre de marque. »

languages.text: «Pasé mi juventud rodeado de lujos. La casa von Valancius tal vez no fuese la más influyente de la Extensión de Koronus, pero sus arcas eran abundantes. Tenía todo lo que quería, excepto lo que más anhelaba. Soñaba con estrellas lejanas y me imaginaba a mí, a Seberian von Valancius, explorando mundos desconocidos, ampliando las fronteras del protectorado...». {n}Las pestañas de Seberian revolotean y su piel se tensa, como si quisiera sonreír.{/n} «Pero mis sueños estaban condenados a ser solo eso, ya que era el quinto en la línea de sucesión de la Patente».
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: «Pasé mi juventud rodeado de lujos. La casa von Valancius tal vez no fuese la más influyente de la Extensión de Koronus, pero sus arcas eran abundantes. Tenía todo lo que quería, excepto lo que más anhelaba. Soñaba con estrellas lejanas y me imaginaba a mí, a Seberian von Valancius, explorando mundos desconocidos, ampliando las fronteras del protectorado...». {n}Las pestañas de Seberian revolotean y su piel se tensa, como si quisiera sonreír.{/n} «Pero mis sueños estaban condenados a ser solo eso, ya que era el quinto en la línea de sucesión de la Patente».

languages.text: "Gençliğimi lüks içinde geçirdim. Von Valanciuslar, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en etkili hane olmasa da zengindik. Gerçekten arzuladığım şey hariç her şeye sahiptim. Uzak yıldızları hayal ediyordum... Kendimi, Seberian von Valancius'u; bilinmeyen dünyaları keşfederken, protektoranın sınırlarını genişletirken düşlüyordum..." {n}Seberian'ın soluk kirpikleri titreşiyor, gülümsemeye çalışıyormuşçasına derisi geriliyor.{/n} "Yine de hayallerim sadece hayal olarak kaldı çünkü Ruhsatname'yi devralma sırasında önümde dört kişi vardı."
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: "Gençliğimi lüks içinde geçirdim. Von Valanciuslar, Koronus Enginliği'ndeki en etkili hane olmasa da zengindik. Gerçekten arzuladığım şey hariç her şeye sahiptim. Uzak yıldızları hayal ediyordum... Kendimi, Seberian von Valancius'u; bilinmeyen dünyaları keşfederken, protektoranın sınırlarını genişletirken düşlüyordum..." {n}Seberian'ın soluk kirpikleri titreşiyor, gülümsemeye çalışıyormuşçasına derisi geriliyor.{/n} "Yine de hayallerim sadece hayal olarak kaldı çünkü Ruhsatname'yi devralma sırasında önümde dört kişi vardı."

languages.text: “我年轻的时候过得很奢靡。冯·瓦兰修斯或许不是科罗努斯扩区最有权势的家族，但我们很富有。除了真正渴望的东西，我什么都有。我向往遥远的星辰，想象着自己，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，去探索未知的世界，扩张属地的疆界……”{n}塞贝里安褪色的睫毛微微颤动，皮肤绷紧，像是要挤出一个微笑。{/n}“可这些终究只是我的梦想，因为我当时不过是贸易授状的第五顺位继承人而已。”
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."

traits.locale_text: “我年轻的时候过得很奢靡。冯·瓦兰修斯或许不是科罗努斯扩区最有权势的家族，但我们很富有。除了真正渴望的东西，我什么都有。我向往遥远的星辰，想象着自己，塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，去探索未知的世界，扩张属地的疆界……”{n}塞贝里安褪色的睫毛微微颤动，皮肤绷紧，像是要挤出一个微笑。{/n}“可这些终究只是我的梦想，因为我当时不过是贸易授状的第五顺位继承人而已。”

languages.text: 「私は贅沢な生活をしながら若年期を過ごした。バルアンシウス家はコロナス・エクスパンスで最も影響力のある家ではなかったかもしれないが、私たちは裕福だった。私は本当に望んでいたもの以外、すべてを手に入れた。私は遠い星々を夢見て、セベリアン・バルアンシウスとして未知の世界を探検し、保護領の境界を拡大する自分を想像した...」{n}セベリアンの薄くなったまつげがちらつく。彼の肌は、まるで笑おうとしているかのように引き締まっている。{/n}「しかし、私の夢は夢のままだった。なぜなら、私は保証書を継承する順番で5番目だったからだ。」
languages.original_text: "I spent my youth in luxury. Von Valancius may not have been the most influential house in the Koronus Expanse, but we were wealthy. I had everything except what I truly desired. I dreamed of distant stars and imagined myself, Seberian von Valancius, exploring unknown worlds, expanding the boundaries of the protectorate..." {n}Seberian's faded lashes flutter, his skin tightening as if he is attempting to smile.{/n} "Yet my dreams remained mere dreams, for I was only fifth in line to inherit the Warrant."
